title: Exchange partition should forbiden parition table with global index
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

```
CREATE TABLE `nt` (
  `a` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `b` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY `u_idx` (`b`)
);

CREATE TABLE `pt` (
  `a` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `b` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY `u_idx` (`b`)
) PARTITION BY RANGE (a) (PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN (10),PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE));

alter table pt exchange partition p0 with table nt;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

return error

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

return success.

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

master
poc: ) PARTITION BY RANGE (a) (PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN (10),PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE));
alter table pt exchange partition p0 with table nt;
key_bug_features: Exchanging partition table with global index allowed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `nt` ( `a` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `b` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, UNIQUE KEY `u_idx` (`b`));

CREATE TABLE `pt` ( `a` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `b` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, UNIQUE KEY `u_idx` (`b`)) PARTITION BY RANGE (a) (PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN (10), PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE));
ALTER TABLE pt EXCHANGE PARTITION p0 WITH TABLE nt;
